title: Machine Spirit
aspect: Spiritual consciousness residing within every significant mechanism
dogma: Honour the spirit within — a machine well-tended is a machine that serves faithfully
worship: Ritual anointing with sacred oils, incantation of activation litanies, respectful operation
lore: The Machine Spirit is the Mechanicus belief that complex machines possess a form of spiritual essence — a dim but real consciousness that must be respected, placated, and communicated with. Tech-Priests speak to their machines not merely as metaphor, but as genuine theological practice.

In truth, many Machine Spirits in advanced Imperial equipment are genuine artificial intelligences of pre-Heresy origin, dimmed and constrained so as not to violate the Men of Iron prohibition. The Mechanicus treats them as sacred without fully understanding what they are.

A machine whose spirit is angered — through misuse, disrespect, or poor maintenance — may malfunction at critical moments. This is not superstition to a Tech-Priest but observable reality, backed by ten thousand years of field data.
